mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(BoardNo) FROM HierarchicalBoard WHERE 1=1
AND boardNo > 0

SELECT LEVEL AS "LEVEL", BoardNo, BoardUpperNo, BoardTitle, BoardDate, BoardGroupNo, BoardIndent FROM HierarchicalBoard START WITH BoardUpperNo = 0 CONNECT BY PRIOR BoardNo = BoardUpperNo ORDER SIBLINGS BY BoardGroupNo DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HierarchicalBoard (BoardNo, BoardTitle, UserId, BoardContent, BoardDate, BoardGroupNo, BoardUpperNo, BoardIndent) VALUES(Board_seq.NEXTVAL, #{BoardTitle}, #{UserId}, #{BoardContent}, sysdate, Board_seq.NEXTVAL, 0, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT BoardNo, BoardTitle, BoardGroupNo, BoardIndent FROM HierarchicalBoard where BoardNo=#{BoardNo}
mapper.insert: insert into HierarchicalBoard (BoardNo, BoardTitle, UserId, BoardContent, BoardDate, BoardGroupNo, BoardUpperNo, BoardIndent) values(Board_seq.NEXTVAL, #{BoardTitle}, #{UserId}, #{BoardContent}, sysdate, #{BoardGroupNo}, #{BoardNo}, #{BoardIndent})
